cocoa.description: A warm drink made from cocoa powder mixed with hot water or milk. Rich and slightly bitter, with a deep chocolate flavour.

cocoa with marshmallows.description: Hot cocoa topped with soft white marshmallows. The marshmallows melt slowly into the surface, adding sweetness and a foamy texture.

chicken broth.description: A clear, savoury liquid made by simmering chicken bones and vegetables. Lightly salted, warming, and often used as a restorative.

black coffee.description: Brewed coffee served without milk or sugar. Strong, bitter, and straightforward.

caffe latte.description: A shot of espresso combined with steamed milk. Milder than black coffee, with a creamy texture and a light foam on top.

hot water.description: Plain water, heated. No flavour, no additives. Available from any vending machine at the press of a button.
